case_title: ROMKON, INC. VS. MARTINEZ LUIS MEDINA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039656) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMKON, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-25-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMKON, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, MARTINEZ LUIS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MEDINA'S CONSTRUCTION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-13-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-21-2018
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-13-2018 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62235773)
